summary: 27 tests passed, 100.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: ModelConfig is a Pydantic BaseModel (not a dataclass) in config/models.py
completion_promises.evidence: ModelConfig inherits from pydantic.BaseModel in config/models.py. Test test_is_pydantic_base_model verifies issubclass(ModelConfig, BaseModel).

completion_promises.criterion_text: provider uses Literal["local", "anthropic", "openai"] for compile-time enforcement
completion_promises.evidence: Field declared as provider: Literal["local", "anthropic", "openai"]. Tests verify all 3 valid providers accepted and invalid providers (azure, huggingface, google) rejected with ValidationError.

completion_promises.criterion_text: model is a required non-empty str
completion_promises.evidence: Field declared as model: str = Field(min_length=1). Tests verify missing model and empty string both raise ValidationError.
Field declared as temperature: float = Field(default=0.7, ge=0.0, le=2.0). Tests verify default is 0.7, boundaries 0.0 and 2.0 accepted, 2.1 and -0.1 rejected.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A model_validator ensures endpoint is non-empty and a valid URL when provider == "local"
completion_promises.evidence: model_validator(mode='after') method validate_local_endpoint checks endpoint is non-empty and urlparse confirms http/https scheme with netloc. Tests verify local+valid URL accepted, local+missing/empty/malformed endpoint all rejected with 'endpoint' in error message.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Anthropic and OpenAI providers accept empty endpoint (use default API)
completion_promises.evidence: model_validator returns early (no validation) when provider != 'local'. Tests verify anthropic and openai both accept empty endpoint (default '') and also accept custom endpoints.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validation errors raise ValidationError with clear messages
completion_promises.evidence: Custom ValueError messages in model_validator include context (e.g. 'endpoint is required when provider is local'). Pydantic Literal/Field constraints produce clear built-in messages. Tests verify error text mentions relevant field names.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check config/models.py config/tests/test_models.py returns 'All checks passed!'
